billions tonnes co2 still pumped into atmosphere every coal oil gas burning slight reduction 2020 result coronavirus lockdowns no tiny blip emissions since resumed upward trajectory

felling forests timber beef soy palm oil big contributor co2 emissions significant cause annihilation wildlife
causes iii methane emissions
methane potent greenhouse gas causes 25 all global heating today fossil fuel extraction cattle rice paddies landfills responsible there scary surge methane emissions since 2007 according scientists potentially due wetlands heating
consequences global temperature rise
planet average temperature started climb steadily two centuries ago rocketed since second world war consumption population risen many records smashed 2023 hottest record global heating means there energy atmosphere making extreme weather events frequent intense
consequences rising sea levels
sea levels inexorably rising ice land melts hotter oceans expand sea levels slow respond global heating so even if temperature rise restricted 2c above preindustrial levels one five people world eventually experience cities being submerged new york london shanghai
